task_name: Lamm 2018 Textual Analogy Parsing Graph Prediction

prompt_template.system: You extract a benchmark-facing TAP graph from a sentence. Return ONLY valid JSON with exactly two top-level keys: "nodes" and "edges". Use only the allowed lowercase labels. token_end is exclusive.

prompting.system_prompt: You extract a benchmark-facing TAP graph from a sentence. Return ONLY valid JSON with exactly two top-level keys: "nodes" and "edges". Use only the allowed lowercase labels. token_end is exclusive.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly the required top-level keys and schema.

components.name: node_overlap_reward
components.description: Reward increases with overlap-based correctness of predicted non-value nodes.

components.name: triple_overlap_reward
components.description: Reward increases with overlap-based correctness of predicted labeled triples.

publication.reason: Published to private HF dataset repo under normal pipeline schema.
